author: y4rr
content: Plan: (1) Probe-before-fix in tests/ comparing manual data_vec permute to view().permute().contiguous() for 4D pattern. (2) Migrate vit.rs PatchEmbed (1 site). (3) Migrate convnext.rs nhwc_from_nchw + nchw_from_nhwc helpers. (4) Migrate swin.rs (18 sites). (5) Generate fixtures + value-parity tests using Phase 1B template. (6) ViT PASS expected; ConvNeXt+Swin REPORTED with new architectural-divergence issues. (7) NO changes to ferrotorch-core/ or ferrotorch-nn/ - existing primitives Tensor::permute(), Tensor::contiguous(), Tensor::view() already work.
